title: geranium incisum
intro: Geranium incisum, also known as cutleaf geranium, is a perennial plant species in the geranium genus, characterized by its deeply cut leaves and vibrant purple flowers. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, possessing anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The medicinal properties of Geranium incisum offer numerous health benefits, including relief from anxiety, insomnia, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Geranium incisum can be found in teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
